data.title: BNB Chain introduces 15 projects for MVB Season 10, emphasizing Web3 innovation in AI, DeFi, DeSci, and more.
data.description: 15 projects have been unveiled by BNB Chain for its MVB Season 10, showcasing early-stage Web3 innovation in areas such as AI, DeFi, and DeSci. This initiative highlights the commitment of BNB Chain to fostering innovative projects in the blockchain space.

data.title: UNI price climbs 4.3% to $10.44 as Uniswap gains strong bullish momentum, signaling further potential.
data.description: The token UNI is currently trading at $10.44, marking a 4.3% increase for the day. Analysts are optimistic about its future performance as technical indicators suggest further potential gains, particularly with Uniswap surpassing significant moving averages.

data.title: LINK up 2.13% at $18.23 aims $22-28 after breaking $19 barrier, boosted by institutional interest.
data.description: The price of LINK is currently at $18.23, marking a 2.13% increase for the day. This surge comes after surpassing the $19 resistance level. Analysts have set optimistic price targets for LINK, ranging between $22 and $28, attributing this to increased institutional adoption.

data.title: Character.AI releases pipeling-sft, a framework for improving MoE LLMs fine-tuning, boosting AI research. #opensource
data.description: Character.AI has recently unveiled pipeling-sft, a new open-source framework created to optimize the fine-tuning process for large language models like Mixture-of-Experts. This tool aims to improve scalability and efficiency in AI research by providing advanced capabilities for developers. This framework presents a significant advancement for the field, offering improved performance and ease of use. By leveraging pipeling-sft, researchers can efficiently fine-tune their models for better results. This innovation is a step forward in enhancing the capabilities of AI technology and streamlining research processes.

data.title: AVAX price soars to $23.86 ahead of ETF decision, with 20M daily transactions. Bullish momentum suggests a breakout.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AVAX is currently trading at $23.86, reflecting a 0.84% increase. There is a growing bullish momentum in the market leading up to the ETF decision on July 28. Record transaction volumes and robust technical indicators suggest the possibility of a significant price breakout in the near future.

data.title: Polkadot (DOT) rises to $4.09 (+2.76%) as institutions drive recovery post 7% drop. Mixed signals forecast future movement.
data.description: The Department of Transportation (DOT) experienced a recovery, rising to $4.09, which marks a 2.76% increase. This uptick came after a notable decline on Thursday. The increase was attributed to significant institutional buying interest in the market. Despite the recovery, technical indicators are sending mixed signals about future movements in the market.

data.title: Monero (XMR) rolls out Version 0.18.4.1 'Fluorine Fermi' with bug fixes and contributions from 14 developers. New binaries released.
data.description: Monero (XMR) has recently launched the latest version 0.18.4.1, codenamed 'Fluorine Fermi', with a primary focus on addressing bugs and enhancing overall performance. This update, which involves the efforts of 14 developers, introduces new binaries to the platform.

data.title: MATIC price battles under $0.40 as Polygon displays bearish signals. Price near $0.35 support, RSI at 38 suggests oversold state amid selling pressure.
data.description: The current price of MATIC is close to a crucial support level at $0.35, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 38. This RSI reading suggests possible oversold circumstances for Polygon, indicating mounting selling pressure on the cryptocurrency.

data.title: DOGE price bounces back 3.6% to $0.24 post institutional selloff, showing recovery signs. Bullish momentum likely.
data.description: After experiencing a 3.6% daily increase, the price of DOGE has rebounded to $0.24 from this week's institutional selloff. Technical analysis indicates a possible uptrend in response to oversold conditions.

data.title: Solana (SOL) stays near $186 post $200 peak, holding strong with RSI at 60.72 amidst minor dip.
data.description: The market is seeing SOL trading at $185.99, showing strong bullish momentum despite a minor decline from its recent peak above $200. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is holding steady in neutral territory at 60.72, indicating a balanced market sentiment.

data.title: Discover how BitVMX watchtowers boost Bitcoin Lightning Network security by offering decentralized protection against fraud, tackling off-chain payment issues. (Read More)
data.description: Discover the significant role of BitVMX watchtowers in boosting security within the Bitcoin Lightning Network. These watchtowers offer decentralized and verifiable defense against fraud, tackling enduring issues in off-chain payment systems. They play a crucial role in safeguarding transactions and preventing potential threats, ultimately contributing to the overall reliability and integrity of the network. Learn more about how BitVMX watchtowers are revolutionizing security measures in the Bitcoin Lightning Network.

data.title: North American environment ministers from Canada, Mexico, and the US commit to enhance environmental cooperation at 32nd annual Council Session in Mexico City.
data.description: In Mexico City, Mexico, a meeting was held this week that brought together the leading environmental officials from Canada, Mexico, and the United States. The event marked the 32nd annual Council Session and Joint Public Advisory Committee (JPAC) Public Forum of the Commission for Environmental.

data.title: Mercury Insurance to broaden homeowners coverage in California following Sustainable Insurance Strategy, boosting marketplace.
data.description: Commissioner Lara has introduced a Sustainable Insurance Strategy aiming to implement science-based risk modeling, enhancing the insurance marketplace. Mercury Insurance (NYSE: MCY), a top provider of property and casualty insurance, is poised to benefit from this strategy. This initiative, announced on July 25, 2025, in Los Angeles, promises to lay the groundwork for a more robust insurance sector.

data.title: Cardano (ADA) aims for $0.94 resistance post ETF speculation, surges by 15.7% to $0.82 on Grayscale's catalyst. Bullish momentum signals ahead.
data.description: ADA is currently trading at $0.82 after Grayscale's ETF application news, signifying a notable increase in value. Technical analysis indicates a positive market trend, with strong upward movement expected. The critical resistance level lies at $0.94, suggesting a potential price surge beyond this point.

data.title: Klotho Neurosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: KLTO) plans to expand development programs beyond neurology to improve brain function, muscle strength, bone health, and longevity indicators.
data.description: Klotho Neurosciences, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol KLTO, has revealed its plans to explore technologies aimed at enhancing brain function, muscle strength, bone health, and other markers associated with longevity. This announcement was made on July 25, 2025, in New York. The company is considering the acquisition of multiple technologies as part of its strategy.

data.title: EigenCloud now offers Multi-Chain Verification, allowing AVSs on Layer 2 chains, boosting flexibility and cutting costs.
data.description: EigenCloud has rolled out Multi-Chain Verification, which allows Autonomous Verification Services (AVSs) to function on Layer 2 chains. This latest addition boosts service adaptability and trims expenses for application users, proving to be a significant development for the industry.

data.title: PUMP token hits $5.5B FDV debut, DOGE leads selloff, whale sends $2b BTC to Galaxy Digital, $79m BTC buy, $0.5b ETH purchased, $1b BTC loans on Coinbase, StanChart offers BTC, ETH trading, banks allowed tight crypto holding rules, major crypto developments ongoing.
data.description: The cryptocurrency market experienced a significant selloff, with DOGE leading the majors. Banks now have the option to hold cryptocurrencies under strict regulations imposed by the Federal Reserve. A massive $2 billion worth of Bitcoin was transferred to Galaxy Digital by a single whale for selling purposes. Sequans made a notable purchase of Bitcoin worth $79 million. The total value of BTC-backed loans surpassed $1 billion collateral on the trading platform Coinbase. Standard Chartered became the first global bank to offer Bitcoin and Ethereum trading services. Bitmine Immersion acquired $500 million worth of Ethereum. Sharplink, the leading holder, purchased an additional $73 million worth of ETH. Bank of America introduced a weekly research publication on cryptocurrencies and expressed optimism towards Ethereum. Ripple, Circle, and BitGo are in the process of obtaining a US bank trust license. xStocks can now serve as collateral on Kamino. Grayscale has filed for an IPO. Revolut Pay via Moonpay is now available across the UK and EEA. The trial for Tornado Cash is set to commence today, and Kazakhstan has outlined plans regarding crypto reserve management.

data.title: Crypto drops, stocks soar to new highs. Sharplink emerges as top ETH holder with $73m purchase. Banks permitted to hold crypto under regulations. Whale transfers $2b BTC for selling. Sequans acquires $79m BTC. BTC loans on Coinbase surpass $1b. StanChart pioneers BTC, ETH trading. Bitmine Immersion acquires $500m ETH. Wall Street giants bullish on ETH. Major players apply for US bank trust license. Grayscale files for IPO. Revolut Pay expands across UK, EEA. Tornado Cash trial begins in Kazakhstan on crypto reserve strategy.
data.description: The recent crypto selloff was spearheaded by DOGE, with banks now permitted to hold crypto assets under stringent regulations from the Federal Reserve. A significant whale transferred $2 billion worth of BTC to Galaxy Digital for selling purposes, while Sequans acquired $79 million worth of BTC. The total value of BTC-backed loans has surpassed $1 billion in collateral on Coinbase. Standard Chartered has become the first worldwide bank to provide trading services for BTC and ETH. Bitmine Immersion made a substantial purchase of $500 million worth of ETH, with Sharplink following suit by becoming the top holder after acquiring an additional $73 million in ETH. Bank of America has introduced a weekly crypto research report and expressed optimism towards ETH. Ripple, Circle, and BitGo are in the process of acquiring a US bank trust license. xStocks are now acceptable as collateral on Kamino. Grayscale has filed for an IPO, and Revolut Pay through Moonpay is now accessible throughout the UK and EEA. The trial period for Tornado Cash is commencing today, and Kazakhstan has unveiled its plans concerning crypto reserves.

data.title: BTC hits $123K, $5.5B pump launch. SUI soars, leading L1s as TVL hits ATH. ETH proposals on ZK integration. Crypto market cap up $1.2T+ since April lows. Blackrock IBIT hits $80b AUM. $600m sellout for PUMP.
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) has surged to new all-time highs, with a dominance of 65%. On July 10, the highest short liquidation in 4 years was recorded. SUI is leading Layer 1 protocols as the Total Value Locked (TVL) reaches an all-time high. Sharplink has acquired $49 million worth of Ethereum (ETH) and has now become the largest ETH holder. ETH has proposed to deepen integration with ZK technology. The cryptocurrency market has added over $1.2 trillion in market capitalization since hitting lows in April. Blackrock's IBIT has become the fastest ever to reach $80 billion in Assets Under Management (AUM). A $600 million sellout was recorded for PUMP.
